news.summary: Rocket Lab USA, Inc. announced the launch window for its upcoming mission for BlackSky Technology Inc. The mission, titled "Full Stream Ahead," is scheduled to lift off from Rocket Lab's Launch Complex 1 in New Zealand on May 28, 2025 (UTC). The goal is to place the next BlackSky Gen-3 satellite into a mid-inclination circular orbit at 470 kilometers to enhance the company's satellite constellation. This will enable the delivery of ultra high-resolution imagery and AI-powered analytics to support daily intelligence operations.
news.headline: Rocket Lab plans 65th launch with 'Full Stream Ahead' mission for BlackSky on May 28, 2025, carrying next Gen-3 satellite into 470km orbit.

news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of May 22, 2025, the Neurostimulation Devices Market is categorized into various segments based on type, including Spinal Cord Stimulation (SCS), Gastric Electric Stimulation (GES), Deep Brain Stimulation (DBS), Sacral Nerve Stimulation (SNS), and Vagus Nerve Stimulation (VNS). These segments cater to different applications such as pain management, neurological disorders, gastrointestinal disorders, and others. This market is witnessing significant growth, with a focus on technological advancements and expanding applications.
news.headline: Neurostimulation Devices Market projected to reach USD 17.2 billion by 2031 due to demand for pain and Parkinson's therapies.

news.summary: In Portsmouth, New Hampshire on May 22, 2025, the Global Seafood Alliance (GSA) has disclosed that registrations have commenced for the 2025 Responsible Seafood Summit. This event is scheduled to be held from September 29 to October 2 at the Intercontinental Cartagena de Indias in Cartagena, Colombia. This summit aims to address key issues in the seafood industry and foster responsible practices. Interested participants can now secure their spots for this significant summit.
news.headline: Registration open for 2025 Responsible Seafood Summit in Cartagena, Colombia from Sept 29 to Oct 2 at Intercontinental Cartagena de Indias.

news.summary: The price of Ethereum (ETH) is currently at $2669, showing a consistent increase towards the $3000 threshold. As the second-largest cryptocurrency based on market capitalization, Ethereum has experienced a 5% surge in value over the past week, driven by growing institutional interest. Noteworthy developments contributing to this rise include BTCS acquiring an additional 3450 ETH, valued at $8.43 million, expanding their total ETH holdings to over 12,500 ETH, representing a 38% growth. BTCS Inc. aims to bolster its blockchain infrastructure by emphasizing Ethereum as a key component. CEO Charles Allen highlighted Ethereum's significance in scaling validator operations. Other opportunities in the market include trading crypto futures on Plus500 for bonuses of up to $200 and educational rewards up to $400 for new traders on Coinbase. These trends signify a bullish momentum for Ethereum amid increasing institutional adoption.
news.headline: Ethereum trading at $2669, up 5% in a week reaching $3000 target. BTCS buys 3450 ETH worth $8.43M, raising total holdings by 38%.

news.summary: Bitcoin reached a milestone by exceeding $111,000 for the first time, achieving a new all-time high. The surge is attributed to institutional inflows, sovereign interest, and regulatory alignment in the U.S. Opening near $109,700, Bitcoin hit $111,900 intraday, a 4% increase for the day and 7% for the week. Futures market open interest soared to $74.3 billion, signaling high leveraged bets on further gains. Bitcoin's moving averages formed a golden cross, indicating a bullish trend, with a 14-day RSI of 62 showing strong momentum. Spot volume in 24 hours hit $90.7 billion, up 12% from the previous day. This can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Bitcoin surges past $111K with futures open interest hitting $74.3B, fueled by institutional and sovereign demand.

news.summary: A popular cloud telecom provider, 800.com, has unveiled a fresh integration with Google Analytics 4 (GA4). This advancement allows users to monitor phone calls in conjunction with website activities and conversions. Through the integration of 800.com and GA4, businesses can achieve a comprehensive view of their overall marketing effectiveness by tracking phone call events, website engagements, and conversions. This collaboration proves to be crucial in the current climate of constrained marketing budgets and economic instability, emphasizing the importance of cost-effectiveness in every aspect of business operations.
news.headline: 800.com integrates with GA4, allowing call tracking to be connected with website conversions. Businesses gain insight into marketing performance.

The Global Spent Nuclear Fuel Management and Recycling Market is experiencing significant expansion driven by rising needs for lightweight, high-strength materials in sectors like automotive, aerospace, electronics, and construction. The market is forecasted to grow steadily between 2025 and 2034.

news.summary: Morson Group has taken a strategic step to expand its presence and expertise in important North American industries by acquiring a US-based technical company. This move, announced on May 22, 2025 in Tustin, California, Houston, and Orlando, Florida, marks Morson's efforts to solidify its standing as a leading global talent solutions provider. This acquisition is part of Morson's broader strategy to enhance its capabilities and reach across key sectors in North America, further establishing itself as a powerhouse in the industry.
news.headline: Morson Group acquires PTS Advance, adding offices in Tustin, Houston, Port Arthur, and Orlando, expanding reach in the U.S.

news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses surpassing $100,000 in Krispy Kreme to reach out to him for a consultation on their potential options. The losses must have occurred between February 25, 2025, and May.
news.headline: Investors urged by Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP to contact regarding losses $100,000+ in Krispy Kreme from Feb 25, 2025 to May.

news.summary: FreshDirect, a prominent online grocer, has recently launched its inaugural pop-up store on Main Street in Southampton, New York. This marks the brand's venture into physical retail with the opening of FreshDirect on Main. The store is strategically located in Southampton, with an array of products that cater to a diverse audience. This initiative by FreshDirect signifies a significant milestone for the company as it expands its reach beyond the online platform.
news.headline: FreshDirect opens first physical store in Southampton, NY, named FreshDirect on Main. Online grocer expands into retail.

news.summary: A recent report by The Research Insights predicts that the worldwide market for Artificial Intelligence in Manufacturing is set to grow significantly. Starting at a value of USD 7.09 billion in 2025, it is forecasted to hit USD 47.88 billion by 2030, showing a robust Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 46.5%. This indicates a substantial increase in demand and adoption of AI technology within the manufacturing sector.
news.headline: AI in Manufacturing market to reach $47.88 billion by 2030, growing at 46.5% CAGR, from $7.09 billion in 2025.

news.summary: In McLean, Virginia, Claritev Corporation (NYSE: CTEV) and Claims Care Revenue Cycle Management LLC, a division of Burjeel Holdings (ADX: BURJEEL) from Abu Dhabi, UAE, have officially solidified their strategic partnership after signing a memorandum of understanding (MoU) last month. This alliance is set to transform revenue cycle management (RCM) in the Middle East and North Africa region.
news.headline: Claritev and Burjeel Holdings partner in strategic collaboration to transform RCM in ME & North Africa, expanding Claritev.

news.summary: Kraken, a cryptocurrency technology platform, has revealed a significant collaboration with Backed, a leading issuer of tokenized stocks, and the Solana Foundation. This partnership aims to introduce tokenized U.S. equities to global investors. The announcement was made during Solana Accelerate, where Backed will kick off by launching SPL-based digital versions of U.S.-listed stocks and ETFs on the Solana blockchain. This move is expected to enhance accessibility and reduce inefficiencies in the financial sector.
news.headline: Kraken partners with Backed to launch xStocks on Solana, tokenizing U.S. equities worldwide. Exciting opportunity for investors!

news.summary: A helicopter equipped with an aerial saw will be used by Mon Power, a subsidiary of FirstEnergy Corp (NYSE: FE), to trim trees along high-voltage transmission lines in 19 counties until the end of the year. This initiative in Fairmont, West Virginia, starting on May 22, 2025, aims to guarantee proper clearance around the lines.
news.headline: Mon Power is using an aerial saw to trim trees along transmission lines in 19 counties, through 2025.

news.summary: Dogecoin (DOGE) saw a significant increase to over $0.24 after a rebound from lows around $0.215. The rise was driven by a 393.6 million DOGE transfer worth around $89 million between unknown wallets, flagged by Binance. This triggered volatility, leading to a V-shaped rebound from the $0.212-$0.217 support zone, supported by increased spot volume and speculative inflows. Dogecoin futures' open interest surged by 63.9% in the past week to $1.62 billion, indicating rising risk-taking. This jump coincided with a general altcoin rotation as traders shifted profits. Total derivatives volume, however, stayed subdued.
news.headline: Dogecoin hits $0.24 as whale moves $89 million worth of DOGE; futures interest rises 63.9% to $1.62 billion.

news.summary: In Toronto, Canadian Hearing Services (CHS) and CUPE 2073 had their first negotiation meeting in over two weeks, where zero proposals were exchanged and no progress was made. CHS arrived at the table with a list of demands for members, including requesting an end to a public campaign where numerous current and former CHS clients shared stories of feeling disappointed by the agency. The meeting, facilitated by a government-appointed mediator, did not result in any bargaining discussions taking place.
news.headline: CUPE and Canadian Hearing Services fail to reach a deal after 4 weeks of strike, no proposals exchanged.

The development is nearing completion, promising to make a significant impact on the housing crisis.

news.summary: Advance Auto Parts Inc. (NYSE: AAP) saw its shares rise as it announced its first-quarter results. The company reported an adjusted earnings per share of 22 cents loss, surpassing the anticipated 82 cents loss by analysts. Despite a 6.8% decrease from last year, quarterly sales reached $2.583 billion, exceeding the expected $2.499 billion. Comparable store sales for the first quarter of 2025 dropped by 0.6%. President and CEO, Shane O'Kelly, acknowledged the challenges posed by recent tariffs but expressed confidence in the company's direction. Additionally, Advance Auto Parts plans to open over 130 new stores by 2027 to boost growth. In the first quarter, gross profit was $1.1 billion.
news.headline: Advance Auto Parts (NYSE: AAP) beats analyst expectations with 22 cents EPS loss in first quarter. Sales $2.583B, down 6.8%.CEO vows focus on turnaround amidst tariffs.

news.summary: Kai Wawrzinek, the founder of Impossible Cloud Network, highlighted the importance of utilizing the same level of resilience that safeguards Bitcoin in securing global cloud infrastructure. Wawrzinek's statements were made following the Web3 cloud platform's achievement of a $470 million valuation after receiving fresh investment from NGP Capital. During an interview with Benzinga, Wawrzinek criticized centralized cloud systems, referencing issues such as vendor lock-in and geopolitical vulnerabilities. Emphasizing the need for a decentralized approach, he stressed that just like Bitcoin, the global cloud should be immune to shutdowns. NGP Capital, a prominent VC firm, now supports ICN's vision of creating a decentralized cloud platform. For further details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga's website.
news.headline: Founder of Impossible Cloud Network believes in Bitcoin's resilience; platform valued at $470M with investment from NGP Capital. Decentralized cloud system aims to avoid issues with centralized systems.

news.summary: Cardano (ADA) is currently priced at $0.7887, showing a 4.13% increase in the last 24 hours, a 1.07% increase in the past week, and a significant 25.82% increase over the last month. The cryptocurrency's founder, Charles Hoskinson, is under scrutiny as allegations of the misuse of 318 million ADA tokens have emerged. These claims suggest that $600M worth of ADA tokens were moved without community consent after the Shelley upgrade in 2020. Despite denying any wrongdoing, an audit of Input Output Global (IOG) has been initiated by Hoskinson to ensure transparency and accountability within Cardano. Firms like BDO International, McDermott Will & Emery, and a blockchain analytics team have been brought in to investigate the matter further. For those interested in trading cryptocurrency, Plus500 is offering up to $200 in bonuses for crypto futures trading, and Coinbase is providing rewards of up to $400 for completing educational courses and making qualifying trades. View the complete story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Cardano price at $0.7887 surges amid $600M ADA misuse allegations. 4.13% rise in 24 hours, 25.82% in a month. Founder denies malpractice, calls for audit.

news.summary: Ahead of hurricane season, a simulation was conducted involving state and local officials, emergency management offices, third-party evaluators, and top technology providers. The simulation aimed to enhance local response capabilities and decrease potential damage. The focus was on implementing emergency preparedness activities and enhancing resiliency measures. This proactive approach involved key stakeholders and utilized cutting-edge technology to improve readiness for potential disasters. The simulation sought to strengthen coordination and preparedness with the involvement of all relevant parties, showcasing a collaborative effort to address potential challenges during hurricane season.
news.headline: CenterPoint Energy conducts emergency response exercise for 2025 hurricane season in Houston; involves officials, evaluators, and tech providers to enhance local preparedness and resilience.

news.summary: In Dublin, a recent report on the Green Methanol Market has been released. The analysis covers the period of 2025-2034 and provides insights into the global and regional trends related to end-use industry, application, methanol type, and region. Green methanol, also known as renewable methanol, is derived from sources like forestry and agricultural waste, biogas, sewage, municipal solid waste (MSW), and black liquor from the pulp and paper industry. This report is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, offering valuable information for industry professionals.
news.headline: Research report on Green Methanol Market 2025-2034 added to ResearchAndMarkets.com, covering major bio-methanol and e-methanol producers.
